---
title: "Optimization, Part II"
toc: true
sidebar: false
---


-   [Linear programming](content_optimization_II.qmd)
-   [Quadratic programming and examples](content_optimization_II.qmd)



```{r, eval = FALSE, echo = FALSE}

Touches on constrained optimization, stochastic gradient descent (maybe)

-   [HMM and ADMM](what_is_ds_ii.qmd)

```
